steps.assistant_text: First -Wo,-zcopy:0 flag-carve land: the target keeps 'or v0,a0' from a plain copy whose branch uses uopt copy-prop otherwise rewrites to a0 — proven via uoptcopy.c find_replacements analysis (branch Ufjp/Utjp uses of plain copies substitute to source var; ~40 pure-C variants floor at 80/81). Per-file CC_ONLY_FLAGS := -Wo,-zcopy:0 + first-fn carve unit + PREFIX_BYTES trampoline + TRUNCATE 0x148; gui_uso.c TRUNCATE shrunk 0x4880->0x4738.

metadata.compiler_flags: -O2 -Wo,-zcopy:0 (per-file flag carve; PREFIX_BYTES 1-word USO trampoline; TRUNCATE_TEXT 0x148)
metadata.verification: make verify ROM byte-identical (82/82 words vs baserom at 0x58D530)
